name: Kenmare Resources PLC
description: Kenmare Resources plc is one of the world’s largest producers of titanium minerals. Listed on the London Stock Exchange and Euronext Dublin, the company operates the Moma Titanium Minerals Mine in Mozambique. Kenmare’s products, which include titanium feedstocks (ilmenite and rutile) and zircon, are key raw materials ultimately consumed in everyday quality-of-life items such as paints, plastics, and ceramic tiles. The company is committed to a long-term strategic approach to business, prioritizing corporate responsibility, the safety of its workforce, and the development of its host communities in Mozambique.
